BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMultiplier1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMultiplier2: During any main game spin, the win multiplier increases by 1 for every extra reel added.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMultiplier3: Wins are then multiplied by the win multiplier and paid once no extra reel is added.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyExpandingStackedSymbolFeature1: Some symbols (excluding Wild symbol) on the reels may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyExpandingStackedSymbolFeature2: If any of these symbols are involved in a win, these symbols will transform themselves into a random number of symbols.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyExpandingStackedSymbolFeature3: If a symbol occupies 2 symbols' spaces and is involved in a win, that symbol will transform itself into 3 or 4 symbols.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyExpandingStackedSymbolFeature4: If a symbol occupies 3 symbols' spaces and is involved in a win, that symbol will transform itself into 4, 5 or 6 symbols.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyExpandingStackedSymbolFeature5: If a symbol occupies 4 symbols' spaces and is involved in a win, that symbol will transform itself into 5, 6, 7 or 8 symbols.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinsFeature1: 3 Free Spins symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Free Spins symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinsFeature2: All symbols in Stacking Symbol Feature are Wild symbols.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinsFeature3: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinsFeature4: During any free spin, the win multiplier increases by 1 for every extra reel added.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: At every spin starting with 3 reels, winning symbols in succession from the 1st reel to the 3rd reel will result in a winning combination and an extra reel is added to the right.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: For every winning combination, payout is made for each symbol according to the "Paytable".
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Free Spins symbol.
BuffaloWinPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: Wild symbol appears on all reels except reel 1.

BuffaloWinRules.GeneralRules1: Buffalo Win is a 3 or more reels, 4-row video slot featuring Infinity Reels, increasing multipliers, and Expanding Stacked Symbol Feature.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

BuffaloWinRules.GeneralRules3: On any spin, if the rightmost reel does not improve any winning combination and there is a Free Spins symbol on the rightmost reel, then an extra reel is added to the right.
BuffaloWinRules.GeneralRules4: The added extra reel is spun, and if it again improves any winning combination, then another extra reel is added and so on.
BuffaloWinRules.GeneralRules5: Wins are calculated once no extra reel is added.
BuffaloWinRules.GeneralRules6: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by bet size and bet level.
BuffaloWinRules.GeneralRules7: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
